description: Manifest of env vars required by a HealthLog production deployment. Used by `pnpm check-env` to catch missing/empty vars BEFORE a deploy ships. v1.4.42 W6 — born out of the v1.4.40 AP-2 .p8 install gap that shipped silently for 3 days.

groups.name: Core
groups.description: Database, app URL, encryption keys. The app refuses to boot without these.

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.purpose: Postgres connection string. App boot fails if missing.

variables.name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
variables.purpose: Database password for the bundled `db` service in docker-compose.yml.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
variables.purpose: Public URL embedded in OAuth redirects, webhook callbacks, APNs deep-links.

variables.name: APP_URL
variables.purpose: Server-side mirror of NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL; used by background workers.

variables.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
variables.purpose: AES-256-GCM key for at-rest encryption of provider tokens. 64 hex chars (32 bytes). Required unless ENCRYPTION_KEYS is set.

variables.name: API_TOKEN_HMAC_KEY
variables.purpose: HMAC-SHA256 key for hashing external Bearer tokens. 64 hex chars.

groups.name: Withings OAuth
groups.description: Required to enable the Withings integration. App boots without these but Withings sync stays disabled.

variables.name: WITHINGS_CLIENT_ID
variables.purpose: Withings OAuth client_id from https://developer.withings.com.

variables.name: WITHINGS_CLIENT_SECRET
variables.purpose: Withings OAuth client_secret.

variables.name: WITHINGS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.purpose: Random secret carried as a path segment in the Withings webhook callback URL. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

groups.name: Polar OAuth
groups.description: Required to enable the Polar AccessLink integration. App boots without these but the Polar connect button stays disabled. Register an app at https://admin.polaraccesslink.com and set the redirect URI to ${NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/api/polar/callback.

variables.name: POLAR_CLIENT_ID
variables.purpose: Polar AccessLink OAuth client id.

variables.name: POLAR_CLIENT_SECRET
variables.purpose: Polar AccessLink OAuth client secret.

groups.name: APNs (iOS push)
groups.description: All four core APNS_* vars together. Missing any disables APNs silently — the v1.4.40 AP-2 gap that motivated this manifest. allOrNone trips the synthetic <all-or-none> required row whenever 1-3 of the 4 are set.

variables.name: APNS_KEY_ID
variables.purpose: 10-char Key ID from Apple Developer.

variables.name: APNS_TEAM_ID
variables.purpose: 10-char Team ID from Apple Developer.

variables.name: APNS_BUNDLE_ID
variables.purpose: iOS app bundle id, e.g. dev.healthlog.ios.

variables.name: APNS_KEY
variables.purpose: APNs auth key (.p8 contents). Use APNS_KEY for 12-factor env-block deploys; APNS_KEY_FILE is the filesystem alternative — at least one of the two must be set.

groups.name: Deploy webhook
groups.description: Coolify -> HealthLog deploy-result webhook. Without this, the auto-deploy success/failure feedback loop is broken.

variables.name: DEPLOY_WEBHOOK_SECRET
variables.purpose: Shared secret for the X-Deploy-Webhook-Secret header on POST /api/internal/deploy-webhook. 64 hex chars.

variables.name: DEPLOY_LOGS_URL
variables.purpose: URL of the deployment dashboard (e.g. the Coolify UI) linked in deploy-failure notifications. Optional; when unset the notification omits the link.

groups.name: TLS leaf pin monitor
groups.description: Baseline for the TLS leaf SPKI-change alarm. The native client pins the served leaf certificate; without this the monitor logs the served pin but cannot alarm on a rotation. See docs/ops/tls-cert-pin.md.

variables.name: TLS_LEAF_SPKI_PINS
variables.purpose: Comma-separated known-good leaf SPKI pins, base64(sha256(DER subjectPublicKeyInfo)) — the same value the native client pins. Hold both the current and the next pin during a dual-pin renewal window.

groups.name: Off-host backups
groups.description: Required ALL-OR-NONE: any of these without the rest disables backups silently.

variables.name: BACKUP_S3_ENDPOINT
variables.purpose: S3-compatible endpoint URL.

variables.name: BACKUP_S3_BUCKET
variables.purpose: Bucket name.

variables.name: BACKUP_S3_ACCESS_KEY
variables.purpose: S3 access key.

variables.name: BACKUP_S3_SECRET_KEY
variables.purpose: S3 secret key.

variables.name: BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_KEY
variables.purpose: Separate AES key for the backup body — MUST NOT match ENCRYPTION_KEY.
